name: Solani 22" Wood Table Lamp - TBL3025 - Black - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your space with the understated elegance of the Solani Table Lamp. It is the perfect blend of form and function, offering a warm and inviting glow to any room. With its sophisticated wood body paired with a soft fabric shade, the Solani Table Lamp seamlessly complements both modern and traditional decor styles. The natural hues of the wood contrast beautifully with the sleek black finish, creating a striking visual appeal that enhances your home or office. Whether placed on a bedside table, desk, or sideboard, this versatile lamp adds a touch of refined style and ambiance to your environment.
